item.name: Get All Available Models for the Given marketId

request.name: Get All Available Models for the Given marketId

description.content: Get the available `VehicleModels` for the given **marketId**. Optional query params **classId**, **bodyId**, **baumuster4prefix**, **baumuster**, **nationalSalesType** or **productGroups** maybe used to filter the result. The baumuster4prefix must conform to the pattern [0-9]{4}.

query.description: This is a class id e.g. '176' for 'A-Class' in Germany.
This is a body id e.g. '1' for 'Limousine' in Germany.
The first four digits of a baumuster are called baumuster4prefix e.g. '1760' for 'Berline' in France.
This is a baumuster e.g. '176042' for 'A 180 Limousine' in Germany.

This is the national sales type (NST) of a distinct baumuster. There is no predefined pattern for the NST, each market defines its NST. e.g. 'E07' in France, 0001 in Germany and ZA1 in South Africa Using the NST markets can define market specific conditions. e.g. different initial configuration, etc.

Specifies to which product groups the vehicles belong which should be returned. The product groups are separated from each other by a comma and are case sensitive. Allowed values are:
  * PKW
  * VAN
  * SMART
Specifies which fields should be included in the result. If this filter is not used, per default all fields are returned.

variable.description: (Required) This is a ISO 3166 language country string e.g. 'de_DE' or 'en_GB'.

item.name: image Vehicle GET

request.name: image Vehicle GET

description.content: Returns URLs pointing to PNG images of a vehicle with a white background.

query.description:
One or more perspectives as a comma separated String list e.g. 'EXT000,EXT010,INT1'.  The following perspectives are available:
  * EXT000-EXT350: EXT000 defines the front view, EXT010 defines a rotation of 10 degress and so forth.
  * INT1-INT4: These are the 4 available interior perspectives.

The default value is EXT020,INT1 if no value is provided.
Set 'true', if you are looking for images with the roof open. This option is only valid for cabrios. Default is 'false'.
Set 'true', if you are looking for images with a darker background and the vehicle's headlights turned on. Default is 'false'.

description.content:
The Car Configurator API offers access to the Mercedes-Benz car configuration functions. It provides required reference data such as the masterdata of all Mercedes-Benz vehicles as well as functions to retrieve initial and changed configurations. In addition to that is is possible to save a newly created configuration so that it can be easily restored or shared with others.

Contact Support:
 Name: The open API platform by Mercedes-Benz
